features: ALIGNMENT AND STABILITY - If you're suffering from alignment related neck and shoulder discomfort, our premium, adjustable back support belt for men and women can help. Start building your muscle memory by wearing it for an hour, twice a day.
PERFECT POSTURE - Our posture brace pulls back your shoulders to help retrain your spinal positioning – which can encourage posture improvement and reduce slouching with proper use over time.
UNDERCOVER SUPPORT - Discreet by design, our back support brace is easy to put on and sits comfortably under your clothes. Providing maximum shoulder support, while drawing minimal attention.
BREATHABLE AND COOL - Crafted from a strong, lightweight, breathable fabric, this back posture corrector keeps you comfortable and cool, while helping to support your alignment.

FIND YOUR PERFECT FIT - Available in 3 sizes, this back brace posture corrector is a sleek and effective way to help improve not only your posture, but your quality of life. Check our size chart for guidance before purchasing.
description: Product Description Perfect Solution for Laptop Slouchers Hides Under Clothing Discreet design allows you to comfortably and cooly wear underneath your clothes. Easy To Put On & Adjust Enjoy the support you need with a lightweight, breathable posture corrector. Wear Twice a Day for One Hour Begin building muscle memory by wearing twice a day for one hour at first.
